rebase_note: After measurement, this commit rebased cleanly over arithmetic-only fj-lax perf commits 0cec991f, 3d49a8cb, and 17892a56; none touched tensor_contraction.rs or the GEMM benchmark target.

profile_backing.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-post-zoxtq-reprofile-0becc cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
profile_backing.routing_note: The broad 10-sample linalg profile ranked GEMM1024 first. The target-specific 80-sample baseline was lower but still valid as the before-run for the claimed profile-backed GEMM lever.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf33-gemm1024-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 80 --measurement-time 5 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

lever.summary: Widen the packed-B register microkernel from MRx4 to MRx8 output columns, halving column-panel count for full-panel GEMM while keeping each output element's k-loop unchanged.
changes: Simd alias widened from F64x4 to F64xN
packed panel layout test fixture adjusted from n=12 to n=24
golden output digest test added for packed NR-wide GEMM

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf33-gemm1024-nr8-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 80 --measurement-time 5 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism.ordering: Every output element is still produced by one row-block worker and accumulates l=0..k in ascending order. Widening NR only computes more independent columns per vector; it does not reassociate a single cell's sum.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: No comparisons or tie-breaking in matmul_2d.
isomorphism.floating_point: No new mixed precision, reductions, or FMA-dependent regrouping. Existing and new matmul_2d bit tests assert to_bits equality with the textbook i-j-k reference, including special values.
isomorphism.rng: No random state is read or written.
isomorphism.errors: Public slice/indexing/error behavior is unchanged; input dimensions and zero-size behavior are untouched.

tests.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf33-nr8-tests-final cargo test -p fj-lax matmul_2d -- --nocapture
tests.result: passed: 9 tests, 1 ignored timing test, 1157 filtered out

proof.check: RCH ts1 cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets passed
proof.clippy: RCH ts1 cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings passed after the final test addition
proof.format: rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/fj-lax/src/tensor_contraction.rs passed; crate-wide cargo fmt --check remains blocked by pre-existing formatting drift in arithmetic.rs, linalg.rs, lib.rs, and tensor_ops.rs outside this lever

next_profile_hint: Reprofile after landing; the precise GEMM1024 baseline is now about 19.5 ms, so Cholesky/LU may again outrank GEMM unless the broader linalg profile says otherwise.
